question: Are any required PDFs scanned, password-protected, multi-column, or locale-dependent, and what worksheets, encodings, or locale conventions occur in tabular exports?
context: Resolved by structural and executable inspection of every initial fixture. The evidence distinguishes text extraction and PDF permission encryption from an opening-password requirement and does not infer support for scans or tabular formats.
decision: All three PDFs are text-extractable, multi-page or multi-column where applicable, and use ZAR formatting. None requires OCR or an opening password; one carries PDF permission encryption but permits text extraction. Unsupported scans, password prompts, and tabular encodings fail closed.
